lines: Callum sits pretty at the top on 19pts and his Morocco side just battered Haiti 4-2 — unfortunately for every other cunt in this sweepstake, Butters, Jim and Wilmot also own a slice of that Moroccan gravy train, so nobody's getting a leg up there.

Ellis, sweetheart, South Korea just got spanked 1-0 by fucking South Africa and are now on the brink of elimination — your Argentina boys are flying but the rest of your squad is an absolute dumpster fire, and Paraguay need to avoid losing to Australia today or you're properly cooked.

Dene is the sweepstake's charity case — bottom of the table on 10pts, Senegal haven't scored a goal, and Tunisia are sitting on zero points in Group F heading into today's match against Al's Netherlands, so brace yourself for another evening of staring at the wall you miserable bastard.

The Foreman is in absolute chaos today — Türkiye are somehow yet to win a game and face a USA side that's steamrolling everyone, while Curaçao, the other crown jewel of his collection, take on Côte d'Ivoire having managed one draw from two; genuinely impressive to pick two teams this shit.

Watch today's Tunisia vs Netherlands �� Al desperately needs the Dutch to keep winning to stay in contention, while Callum and Dene are praying Tunisia finally wake the fuck up and grab their first points; something's got to give, and history suggests it'll be Dene's hope.
